name: Lynk Networks
notes:
Our policy is generally open but if we see you through route servers and we don't exchange more than a few megabits of traffic to yourselves then we may ask that sessions are kept to route servers only

We may decide to only send our regional routes to an ISP where sending all of our routes may have a detrimental effect on the latency and routing of existing traffic. Our regions are Europe, Asia and America currently. Where we have low port speeds onto an exchange, we will happily peer with ISPs (and actively want to establish peers there) but we consider these backup routes so you may not see much traffic from us.

We recommend a max-prefix value of 500, and prefer md5 passwords on sessions.

We usually will accept private peering requests for peers where we exchange 75Mbps or more. PNIs must be a minimum of 1Gbps and we aim to start looking at upgrading capacity once a PNI regularly exceeds 50%

Most of our traffic is IPTV from multiple popular services, if you'd like to discuss us sending our traffic to you via alternative routes then please get in touch with our Support contact.
